isolation.interactionBoundary: read-only validation interactions (navigation, viewport resize, scroll, inspect, screenshots)

assertionResults.reason: Navbar rendered at 72px height with surface1 background (rgb(19, 19, 19)). A wallet/auth trigger button is visible in the navbar right section as 'Log In' (top=19px,left=1266px,width=67px,height=35px,color=rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65)). Clicking it opened the wallet connection modal with options including Aptos/Solana/Ethereum and social login providers; console errors remained empty.

Breadcrumb above token header uses an SVG chevron separator between 'Tokens' and 'CASH'. DOM sibling inspection returned [span 'Tokens', svg, span 'CASH'], confirming separator is an <svg> element and not text '>' or '/'. Console errors remained empty.

At 1023x768 viewport, main layout computed styles showed display:flex with flex-direction:column and only one primary child column (childCount=1), confirming two-column collapse below 1024px. Horizontal overflow check was false (document scrollWidth=1023, clientWidth=1023).

Desktop (1440x900): swap sidebar ancestor computed position:sticky with top:72px; after scrolling to scrollY=446 it remained pinned at topViewport=72, confirming sticky right sidebar behavior. Mobile (<1024): at 768x1024 layout computed flex-direction:column and swap container/button computed position:static with inline width (container width=728px, button width=710px), confirming inline flow instead of fixed sidebar.

summary: Validated 4 assigned assertions on localhost:3102: NAV-004 pass, HEADER-004 pass, CROSS-002 pass, CROSS-003 pass. No blockers and no browser console errors observed.
